creator: support@spectrum.ru
text:
Update port net-mgmt/argus3 up to 3.0.2
	Removed:
		net-mgmt/argus3/files/patch-Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3/files/patch-argus_Makefile.in
		net-mgmt/argus3/files/patch-common_Makefile.in
	Added:
		net-mgmt/argus3/files/argus.in

Fix: 1. cd /usr/ports
	2. rm net-mgmt/argus3/files/*
	3. touch net-mgmt/argus3/files/argus.in
	4. applay this patch
